chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos. 1542 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.3902/2023. 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.3903/23. 06.10.2025 Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for the applicant along with Sanaullah, Director Intelligence and Investigation Customs. Under Instructions, learned Counsel does not press this reference, which is dismissed as withdrawn. The presence of officer is appreciated and dispensed with. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
